=== 340B DUAL DISCOUNT NATIONAL SUMMARY ===
Total active 340B covered entities: 62,548
Total contract pharmacy arrangements: 375,374
Carve-in arrangements (Medicaid Billing = Yes): 3,234
Carve-in rate: 0.86%
States with carve-in activity: MN, TX, MA, NY, KY, ND, AZ, FL, IL, CA, NC
Total Medicaid drug spending (2023): $99.7B
Medicaid spending in carve-in states: $45.1B

The dual discount problem occurs when drug manufacturers are subject to both 340B discounted pricing and Medicaid drug rebates on the same prescription. Federal law prohibits this, but enforcement is challenging because state Medicaid programs must identify which claims involve 340B drugs. Only 0.86% of contract pharmacy arrangements are flagged as carve-in (billing Medicaid), concentrated in 11 states.
